title: Send pdf file to specific E-Mail
excerpt:
Hi, 
How can I make an automation that send pdf file when it uploaded to monday to 
a specific E-mail address ? 
 
Thanks!

posts.author: dharmikjagodana (DHARMIK JAGODANA)
posts.cookedHtml: EasyMails got your back for this one. It’s pretty straightforward—just set it up to shoot off those PDFs to your specified email when they land on monday.com. Plus, you can attach them right from the item itself. Easy peasy!
